title: malvastrum incanum
intro: Malvastrum incanum, also known as the Mexican sweetroot or yellow root, is a perennial plant species in the mallow family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which aid in the treatment of various health issues. The health benefits of Malvastrum incanum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. The plant is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or powder for its various herbal applications, and can be found in some herbal supplements and traditional medicine practices.
